name: Satoshi Stablecoin V2
redeem: satUSD is documented as redeemable through River for $1 worth of collateral when the system TCR is above 110%; redemptions target the lowest-collateralized positions first and include a dynamic fee of baseRate + 0.5%. Users may also exit through available DEX or stablecoin swap liquidity; docs mention a 3-day withdrawal lockup for satUSD-to-USDT/USDC swaps, but no KYC requirement is documented.
bridging: satUSD uses LayerZero OFT for native cross-chain transfers, described by River as slippage-free and without third-party bridge wrappers. River docs separately indicate current bridge support for BEVM, BOB, BSquared, and Bitlayer, while satUSD contracts are deployed on more networks.
notes: Over-collateralized omnichain CDP stablecoin backed by BTC, ETH, BNB and LST collateral. Exit mechanics are documented, but rely on protocol health, available liquidity, and a relatively complex cross-chain system.
